description: Build the AI Content Generator SaaS - a web app that generates blog posts, social media content, and emails using AI. Located at active-saas/ai-content-generator/
steps: Create active-saas/ai-content-generator/ directory structure with: package.json, server.js, routes/, views/, public/, db/
Set up Express.js server with EJS templates in server.js
Create SQLite database schema in db/schema.sql with tables: users (id, email, password_hash, created_at), content (id, user_id, type, prompt, result, created_at)
Build authentication routes in routes/auth.js with register/login/logout using bcrypt and express-session

Build content generation routes in routes/content.js with endpoints for blog posts, social media, and email generation. Use a mock AI service that generates template-based content (simulating AI output without requiring an API key)
Create landing page view in views/index.ejs with hero section, features list, pricing section, and CTA
Create dashboard view in views/dashboard.ejs showing content history and generation form with type selector (blog/social/email), prompt input, and generated output display
Create public/css/style.css with modern SaaS styling - gradient hero, card components, responsive layout
Create public/js/app.js with client-side form handling and AJAX content generation requests
Add comprehensive README.md with project description, features, setup instructions, and screenshots placeholder
Add basic tests in tests/app.test.js testing server startup, auth routes, and content generation endpoint
acceptance_criteria: npm start launches the server on a configurable port
Landing page renders with all sections
Dashboard allows content generation with different types
Generated content is saved to SQLite database
